title: Golden Dandelion Backport
description: Backports the newly added Golden Dandelion, a flower that permanently pauses the aging of baby mobs when fed to them. Backport will be for versions 1.12.2 and onwards.
body:
> If this project helped you, please consider leaving some stars [on the Github](https://github.com/Derec-Mods)!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e3372ba1e0b121215b2d0e098f92e91546a2bf9_0.webp)

## Golden Dandelion Backport

Originally a few weeks ago, after baby mobs were announced, I was going to create a plugin port and mod port of a new potion to pause aging of animals. However, the week after baby mobs were dropped, Mojang announced the Golden Dandelion, which basically took care of that issue. 

So in **Minecraft 26.1 / Tiny Takeover**, Mojang added the **Golden Dandelion**. It can be used to pause and resume the aging of baby mobs, and includes features other backports currently don't have, such as **suspicious stew** crafting and yellow dye crafting.

This mod aims to backport that feature in a way similar to the **[Mace Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mace-backport)** I developed two years ago.


License: MIT
